description:
Three-axis improvement pass on ir_codegen.rs:

REMOVE (dead code)
- fns_needing_host_ctx: always-empty HashSet, 6 dead .contains() sites, 3 dead branches
- stub_fn_ids: always-empty BTreeMap, threaded through compile_fn + lower_prim for nothing

DEDUPLICATE
- resolve_tcc_body_sid: 4 identical closure-lit resolution blocks → one function
- emit_fn_body: 4 identical make_context/FunctionBuilder/define/clear loops → one helper

STRUCTURE
- VarBinding: var_map + var_reprs (two parallel HashMaps) → one HashMap<u32, VarBinding>
- CodegenEnv: 10 params shared between compile_fn + lower_prim → one context struct
- build_entry_harness: 200-line entry setup block extracted from compile_fn
- SpecRegistry: move to src/spec_registry.rs (self-contained data structure, wrong file)

DAG:
  T1 remove fns_needing_host_ctx  ─┐
  T2 remove stub_fn_ids            ├──> T6 CodegenEnv ──> T7 build_entry_harness
  T5 VarBinding                   ─┘
  T3 resolve_tcc_body_sid             (independent)
  T4 emit_fn_body                     (independent)
  T8 SpecRegistry extraction          (independent)
title: fz-cg2 [EPIC] codegen: dead param removal, deduplication, structural refactoring
